Workflow: .github/workflows/publish.yml

Secrets and tokens used:

1. NUGET_API_KEY
   Required for: Publish to NuGet.org job
   What it is:   A NuGet.org API key with permission to push packages.
   Where to get: NuGet.org -> account settings -> API Keys -> Create
   Recommended:  Scope the key to AppoMobi.MauiRust.Templates only,
                 select "Push new packages and package versions".

2. GH_TOKEN
   Required for: Publish to GitHub Packages job
   What it is:   A GitHub Personal Access Token with write:packages scope.
   Where to get: GitHub -> Settings -> Developer settings -> Personal access tokens
                 -> Generate new token -> select write:packages (and read:packages).
   Store as:     A repository secret named GH_TOKEN.
